chief_complaint: 52-year-old male patient with recurring pneumonitis symptoms, including fever, dyspnea, and a severe cough.
history: Immunosuppressed patient due to rituximab use for chronic inflammatory demyelinating polyneuropathy. Required hospitalization 4 times over a 3-month period due to recurring pneumonitis symptoms. Negative SARS-CoV-2 polymerase chain reaction tests on 7/8 nasopharyngeal specimens, and failure to clinically improve with remdesivir.
exam: Vital signs and physical examination findings not explicitly stated.
labs: Negative SARS-CoV-2 polymerase chain reaction tests on 7/8 nasopharyngeal specimens, failure to clinically improve with remdesivir, and a positive test from a bronchoalveolar lavage specimen.
